Comment: Contains basic peens, i.e. little bits of metal holding the sword together.

Contains risers (e.g. a thick wire underneath a leather wrapping) and ferrules (spacers, typically made from metal, hence the 'shine'). Keeping some notion of risers and ferrules intact is more important than the play on words.
Contains end caps for sword guards and other decoration.
Contains advanced peens, i.e. little bits of metal holding the sword together.
